capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a policy management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a policy management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the policy management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the policy management service is reviewed quarterly for efficacy

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a reference policy framework that provides visibility on who can access what across the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a reference policy framework exists

questions.prompt: Is the policy framework applicable enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the policy framework is enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Is the policy framework reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of the policy framework

questions.prompt: Is the policy framework reused when creating granular functional policies (data access, authentication, authorization, etc.)?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of the framework for granular functional policies

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized, documented KPIs and KRIs for the policy management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether policy management KPIs and KRIs are documented

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track policy drift rate or unauthorized rule exceptions across enforcement points?
questions.intent: Evaluate policy drift and exception metrics

questions.prompt: Are rule deployment success rates and rollback events measured for policy changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate rule deployment success and rollback metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Rule deployment success and rollback metrics

questions.prompt: Are policy management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of policy management KPIs and KRIs

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a centralized rule management system (or centralized policy consumed by multiple enforcement points), rather than only technology-specific silos?
questions.intent: Evaluate centralized vs technology-specific rule management

questions.prompt: Does the rule platform support automation, optimization, and policy-as-code (for example GitOps or infrastructure-as-code pipelines)?
questions.intent: Evaluate rule automation, optimization, and policy-as-code

questions.prompt: Does the rule management system integrate with a central decision-maker or threat intelligence to deploy contextual policy changes automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate integration with centralized decision-making

questions.prompt: Is the rule management system and its configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of rule management system configuration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented, formalized process for rule creation and modification?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented rule creation and modification process
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented rule creation and modification process

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a documented, formalized process for rule deletion and deprovisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented rule deletion and deprovisioning process
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented rule deletion and deprovisioning process

questions.prompt: Are rule lifecycle processes applicable enterprise-wide for all technologies?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide applicability of rule lifecycle processes

questions.prompt: Are rule creation, modification, and deletion automated and optimized through the rule management system where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated rule lifecycle and optimization

questions.prompt: Are rule lifecycle processes reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of rule lifecycle processes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a central policy architecture team, or are policy teams siloed by enforcement technology?
questions.intent: Evaluate central vs siloed policy teams

questions.prompt: Is policy management team composition formalized, documented in the department hierarchy, and designed to maintain separation of duties?
questions.intent: Evaluate formalized team composition and separation of duties
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized team composition and separation of duties

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise maintain and configure software-defined policy at all locations?
questions.intent: Evaluate software-defined policy at all locations

questions.prompt: Is centralized policy deployed programmatically to all enforcement points (not limited to a smaller scope)?
questions.intent: Evaluate programmatic deployment scope for software-defined policy

questions.prompt: Are software-defined policy deployments automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated software-defined policy deployment

questions.prompt: Are automated software-defined policies validated at least quarterly to measure automation efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly validation of automated policy deployments

questions.prompt: Do network security devices deploy consistent context-based access control (not IP-only policies) enterprise-wide—for example across firewalls, WAFs, and load balancers?
questions.intent: Evaluate context-based network access control vs IP-only policies
questions.evaluation_focus: Context-based network access control vs IP-only policies

questions.prompt: Do edge and access devices deploy context-based authentication policies (beyond user ID only) enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate context-based authentication policies enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Are authorization policies—including guest authorization—designed from context, attributes, and environment triggers and deployed uniformly enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate context-based authorization and guest policies enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Context-based authorization and guest policies enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Do applications deploy context-based access policies beyond network controls, uniformly enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate context-based application access policies enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Is data access controlled based on classification, context, and environment criteria with uniform enterprise-wide policies?
questions.intent: Evaluate classification and context-based data access policies enterprise-wide
questions.evaluation_focus: Classification and context-based data access policies enterprise-wide

questions.prompt: Are context-based domain policies (network, authentication, authorization, application, and data) reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate quarterly review of domain context-based policies
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly review of domain context-based policies

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging rule and policy updates to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented logging of policy updates to the SOC

questions.prompt: Is logging of rule changes and lifecycle events made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate secure logging of rule changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic rule and policy changes captured and transferred to the SOC in near-real time?
questions.intent: Evaluate capture and transfer of dynamic rule changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are anomalous bulk policy changes or unauthorized rule modifications detected and alerted in near-real time?
questions.intent: Evaluate anomalous policy change detection and alerting

questions.prompt: Does the organization distinguish approved AI tools from shadow AI tools in policy, and enforce data handling boundaries accordingly?
questions.intent: Evaluate approved versus shadow AI tool policy boundaries
questions.evaluation_focus: Approved versus shadow AI tool policy boundaries

questions.prompt: Are data handling and retention policies defined for enterprise AI systems and AI-assisted workflows?
questions.intent: Evaluate data handling and retention policies for AI systems
questions.evaluation_focus: Data handling and retention policies for AI systems

questions.prompt: Is there a policy governing delegated agent actions on behalf of users, aligned to EU AI Act risk tiers and internal risk appetite?
questions.intent: Evaluate delegated agent action policies aligned to EU AI Act risk tiers
questions.evaluation_focus: Delegated agent action policies aligned to EU AI Act risk tiers
